messages.text: You break into a soaring virtuoso solo, and the music floods your own veins; your strikes and your spellcraft sharpen to a brilliant edge.
{name} breaks into a soaring virtuoso solo, wreathing themselves in brilliant, driving music.
Your virtuoso solo winds down and its brilliant edge fades from your strikes.
{name}'s virtuoso solo winds down and falls silent.
{name} is caught up in a soaring virtuoso solo, their every strike and spell keenly sharpened.
